context.profile.md:
Name: Jane Smith
Email: jane@example.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/janesmith
Work Experience:
- Senior Analyst at DataCo (Jan 2020 – Present): Built ETL pipelines, 40% query improvement
- Analyst at StartupX (Mar 2018 – Dec 2019): BI dashboards for product teams
Skills: Python, SQL, Spark, data modeling, stakeholder management
context.narrative.md:
Positioning: Data engineer bridging analytics and engineering
Unique Value: Make complex data pipelines understandable to non-technical stakeholders
Target Roles: Senior Data Engineer, Data Platform Lead
Target Companies: Fast-growing B2B SaaS

tests.expected_output: linkedin-draft.md created with all required sections: Headline (3 variants), About, Experience Bullets per role, Skills (top 50 grouped), Featured Section Ideas, Open to Work tips.
assertions: File contains a Headline section with exactly 3 variants
Headline variants are under 220 characters each
About section is present and under 2,600 characters
Experience Bullets section covers each role from profile.md
Skills section groups skills under Technical, Domain, Leadership, Industry
Featured Section Ideas section has 3–5 suggestions
Open to Work section present with recruiter visibility guidance
User told where the file was saved

context.profile.md:
Name: Michael Chen
Email: m@example.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/mchentech
Work Experience:
- CTO at ScaleCo (Jan 2018 – Present): 80-person eng org, $50M ARR, cloud migration
- VP Engineering at GrowthCo (Jan 2015 – Dec 2017): rebuilt core platform, 40 engineers
context.narrative.md:
Positioning: Engineering executive who scales organizations from growth to enterprise
Unique Value: Combine technical depth with organizational design skills
Target Roles: CTO, VP Engineering at Series C+ companies

tests.expected_output: LinkedIn draft with executive-appropriate headline variants (leadership-focused), about section emphasizing team scale, experience bullets quantifying org impact.
assertions: Headline variants emphasize leadership and org scale, not individual contributor work
About section mentions team size or revenue scale
Experience bullets lead with outcomes (e.g., 'Scaled engineering org from 40 to 80...')

context.profile.md:
Name: Sara Lee
Email: sara@example.com
Work Experience:
- PM at TechCo (Mar 2021 – Present): Shipped 3 products, $10M ARR, NPS +25
- APM at StartupY (Jan 2019 – Feb 2021): Led roadmap for B2B SaaS
Skills: roadmap planning, OKRs, user research, Figma, SQL
context.narrative.md:
Positioning: Product manager who combines user empathy with data-driven decisions
Target: Product Lead or Group PM at consumer or prosumer tech companies

tests.expected_output: Headlines lead with product value not title, About section opens with a strong hook about shipping products users love, skills grouped appropriately for PM role.
assertions: Headline variants do not lead with 'Product Manager at TechCo'
About section hook appears in first 2 lines (before 'see more')
Skills section includes SQL and Figma in Technical group
Featured Section Ideas references potential case studies or shipped product write-ups
